title: Pyramid Texts, Utterance 1
description: Utterance 1 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.
introduction: Utterance 1 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.

translation.text: Recitation by Nut, the great one who is in the lower mansion: 'The King is my eldest son, who split open my womb. He is my beloved, with whom I am well pleased.'
